creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to ports.maintainer from comment #6)

This is my custom port for the FreeBSD machines here. It only makes sense inside the Siemens network. I just wanted to show you that it is trivial to install custom CA certs via port and invoke certctl(8). I can provide you the sources of the port and you can adapt to your will. No problem.
